zh.lifeSummary: 當Knight William I Maudit於大約1067年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普時，他的父親Hugh de Grandmesnil36歲，母親Adeliza Beaumont29歲。他和Matilda至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1101年在英國英格蘭哈普爾素坦普頓享年36歲。

nameMeanings.name: Maudit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mawditt
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French mal-duit ‘badly brought up, ill educated’ (Latin male doctus).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Knight William I Maudit was born about 1067, in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh de Grandmesnil, was 36 and his mother, Adeliza Beaumont, was 29. He had at least 1 son with Matilda. He died about 1101, in Southampton, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Knight William I Maudit est né environ 1067, à Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Grandmesnil, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Adeliza Beaumont, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Matilda. Il est décédé environ 1101, à Southampton, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Knight William I Maudit um 1067 in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Grandmesnil 36 und seine Mutter Adeliza Beaumont 29. Er hatte mit Matilda mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1101 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Southampton, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Knight William I Maudit è nato il circa 1067 nel Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hugh de Grandmesnil, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Adeliza Beaumont, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Matilda. Morì circa 1101, nel Southampton, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Knight William I Mauditが約1067年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンスロペで生まれた時，父Hugh de Grandmesnilは36歳，母Adeliza Beaumontは29歳であった。彼はMatildaとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1101年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアソウサンプトンで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Knight William I Maudit(이)가 대략 1067년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 핸슬로프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Grandmesnil(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza Beaumont(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Matilda(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1101년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 소우섬프턴에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Knight William I Maudit nasceu aproximadamente 1067, em Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh de Grandmesnil, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza Beaumont, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Matilda. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1101, em Southampton, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Knight William I Maudit родился около 1067 г. в местности ханслоп, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh de Grandmesnil было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Beaumont, 29. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Matilda. Он умер около 1101 г. в местности соутамптон, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.
